title: hypolepis rugosula var. poeppigii
intro: Hypolepis rugosula var. poeppigii, also known as the rough-leaved ladder fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dicksoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hypolepis rugosula var. poeppigii include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and soothing respiratory problems. Hypolepis rugosula var. poeppigii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and its leaves can also be used to make a tea or tincture for medicinal purposes.
